experience.subtitle: Career Trajectory
experience.description: A timeline of my professional journey, highlighting key roles, architectural decisions, and the digital systems I've helped build.

suar.description: Collaborated on custom Ghost CMS themes and core functional page development. Built a customized Ghost CMS distribution featuring a tailored editorial post-locking mechanism. Shipped 5+ production-ready components, including a subscription pipeline and interactive popups supporting over 60,000 platform views in an agile turnaround environment.

promokna.description: Co-founded an event management startup and directed technical execution, including hosting infrastructure, technology stack selection, and backend system architecture. Engineered scalable event registration engines successfully orchestrating operations for 9+ high-capacity events with over 3,000 handled participants.

intermedia_head.description: Managed an engineering team maintaining three organizational web platforms. Spearheaded the BeSmart monthly curriculum tracking 6 comprehensive tracks for classes. Engineered cloud infrastructure on AWS to handle 120+ active users securely.

zt_corpora.description: Mitigated system vulnerabilities by debugging core corporate email verification routines. Integrated standard regional multi-courier shipping estimation APIs covering 80,000+ logistics areas. Architected an offline-first QR code inventory system tracking 165+ items and assisted as an educational boot camp technical mentor.

intermedia_staff.description: Led implementation of a full-stack Learning Management System (LMS) boosting engagement metrics by 20%. Built optimized document generation workflows that reduced platform certificate delivery delay margins by 40%.

bakaran.description: Partnered on multi-platform web applications under structured Git version environments. Maintained agile cross-functional workflow capabilities by implementing auxiliary Golang system modifications and co-authored three technical book chapters regarding web engineering structures.
